tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def filtered
  (filter (fn [pr]
            (and (> (get pr :additions) 400)
                 (nil? (get pr :closes_linear))))
          all-open-prs))

(def filtered-vec (vec filtered))

(count filtered-vec)"}
